title: 🔍 This AI Screener Just Flagged 3 Stocks with Unusual News Momentum (Full Analysis Inside)
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
Ever wish you could spot trend shifts before the crowd?

The News Momentum QuantSignals AI Screener just identified actionable setups for Monday based on breaking catalysts and unusual volume patterns—before major moves typically occur.

What you'd see in the full breakdown: • 2 tech stocks showing 150%+ average volume spikes with positive earnings revisions • 1 healthcare play with breaking FDA news and highest sentiment score this month • Momentum scores exceeding 85/100 on backtested models

This isn't just data—it's filtered, quantifiable edge delivered to subscribers who get the complete analysis with entry/exit levels and risk parameters.

The algorithm flags only high-probability setups (less than 5% of screened stocks make the cut), so when it signals, it's worth your attention.

Full analysis with charts and levels is ready for subscribers. Tap to see why serious traders are using this screener to catch early momentum.
